Rung.Comment:
get current time stamp from PLC clock, this is unix time and is stored as a LINT and represents the number of microseconds from January 1st, 1970 at UTC
convert this to number of seconds by dividing by 1,000,000, store this number in a DINT so it can be compared to the time stamp from the HMI which is unix time but stored as number of seconds
then calculate the difference in seconds between the PLC clock and the HMI clock
Reset time checking tags on first scan
TGL - added rung to set clock from HMI on Estop - 11/30/2018 TGL - Modified to only change time if difference is GEQ alarm setting. Modified to use epoch datetime form HMI - 2/11/2019
